entryServices.title: QA Consulting
entryServices.target: B2B SaaS, Fintech and Startups with production bugs
entryServices.pain: Is your manual QA not scaling with your release velocity? Are bugs reaching production before you can catch them?
entryServices.desc: We audit your quality process, design the automation framework and eliminate bugs before they reach your users.
features: QA audit and action plan in 5 days
Automation with different methods adapted to your product's architecture and needs
CI/CD integration for continuous quality
Coverage reports and quality KPIs
Tailored Strategies: We design a Quality Assurance (QA) plan fully adapted to your product's architecture and needs
Excellence Standards: We define rigorous testing methodologies, implemented and guided directly by expert technical leaders

entryServices.title: Automation
entryServices.target: Companies with complex UIs and frequent releases
entryServices.pain: Every release is a risk. Every bug visible to the customer costs money, time and reputation.
entryServices.desc: AI-powered QA: automated visual testing, regression detection and intelligent coverage of your product's most critical cases.
features: Delivery Acceleration: We maximize your time-to-market by enabling faster deployments without sacrificing product quality
Continuous Integration (CI/CD): We design and implement test automation architectures integrated directly into your pipelines
Operational Efficiency: We drastically reduce repetitive manual work, allowing your team to focus 100% on innovation
Rigorous Validation: We ensure every new line of code is evaluated automatically, quickly and accurately before reaching production

entryServices.title: Web & Mobile App Development
entryServices.target: Companies that need solid digital platforms
entryServices.pain: Your digital presence doesn't match your company's level. You need a platform that converts, scales and stays up.
entryServices.desc: We design and develop websites and mobile apps with clean architecture, optimized for performance and conversion from day one.
features: Frontend and backend development with clean code
Native and hybrid iOS and Android apps
Scalable Digital Products: We turn your ideas into high-performance solutions, ready to grow at your company's pace
Multiplatform Development: We build everything from complex web platforms to custom native and hybrid mobile applications
Technical Quality & UX: We build software based on clean code, robust architecture and an impeccable user experience

enterpriseServices.title: Integración CTO + Dev Team + Web & Apps
enterpriseServices.target: Startups without a senior technical team
enterpriseServices.value: The senior CTO you need, without the cost or risk of a full-time hire.
enterpriseServices.desc: Strategic technical leadership plus a turnkey development team. We define architecture, set standards, deliver code and scale your product alongside you.
features: Strategic Leadership (CTO): We bring the technical vision of a Chief Technology Officer to design architecture and align technology with your business objectives
End-to-End Development: We execute the creation of your web platforms and mobile applications with a squad expert in clean, scalable code
Quality & Automation (QA): We protect your product by integrating rigorous testing methodologies and automation into your CI/CD pipelines
All-in-One Solution: Scale your company with the operational capacity of a complete technology department, at a fraction of the traditional cost
Product architecture and complete technical roadmap
Developer team selection and leadership
Technology stack definition and code standards
PR reviews, quality gates and technical debt management
Direct communication with founders and investors

enterpriseServices.title: Performance & Social Media Management
enterpriseServices.value: Computer vision and AI in production in weeks, not months. Social Media Production in Weeks, Not Months.
enterpriseServices.desc: We build and manage your brand's digital presence to generate authority and connect with your ideal audience. We don't just post content; we design data-driven strategies to position your company in the competitive market, optimizing every channel to maximize impact and return on investment.
features: Data-Driven Strategy: We analyze your market and competition to design a content plan that truly resonates with your potential clients
Full Channel Management: We operate your social media from end to end, ensuring a consistent, professional and active brand voice
Authority Positioning (B2B): We create valuable content that projects your company's leadership and expertise within your sector
Metrics & Performance: We measure the impact of every campaign with clear analytical reports, adjusting the strategy to guarantee continuous growth
Visual Creation (Graphic Design / Video)
Usage license + monthly technical support included
Real-time monitoring and alerts

whyItems.title: Architecture without technical debt

whyItems.title: AI-powered QA: more coverage, fewer hours
